_note: Static, ITR-verified F&O figures. INR. Net = Gross - Charges. Update manually from broker statements / ITR.

carryforward.label: CF entering AY26-27
carryforward.sub: Full CF intact — no set-off in FY25-26 (net F&O loss)

cfNote: FY25-26 F&O resulted in a net loss (−₹12,619) — zero CF absorption occurred. The full ₹6,01,979 pool enters FY26-27 intact. FY26-27 YTD S02 realised (+₹92,512) will begin absorbing the non-spec CF. Speculative CF (₹84,268) absorbs only intraday profit — not credit spread or stock F&O income. STCG CF (₹4,700) to be absorbed by FY26-27 equity gains.
